/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_motor_controller_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libros2_motor_controller_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/ros2_motor_controller_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ros2_motor_controller_msgs/srv/keyboard_commands__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ros2_motor_controller_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ros2_motor_controller_msgs/msg/velocity_feedback__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
